subcodes.first_line: The Book hath verily testified unto the Mighty, the Bestower, yet most of the people hear not, for they have cast the Cause of God behind their backs, except their Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد شهد الکتاب للعزیز الوهاب و لکن الناس اکثرهم لا یسمعون فقد نبذوا امر الله عن ورائهم الا ربهم
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @suffering and imprisonment, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @idolatry, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prophecy and fulfillment
